params.name: url
params.description: Href for the footer link item. The legacy `URL` key is also supported.

params.name: label
params.description: Visible label for the footer link item.

params.name: external
params.description: Adds a right-side launch icon for external links.

params.name: openInNewWindow
params.description: Opens the link in a new window and adds `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.

params.name: smallPrint
params.description: Small-print line shown below the support links.

params.name: legalText
params.description: Additional legal copy shown below the small-print line.

params.name: socialLabel
params.description: Optional label shown before the social links. Defaults to `Follow us`.

params.name: label
params.description: Accessible label override for the social link.

params.name: openInNewWindow
params.description: Opens the social link in a new window.

params.name: classes
params.description: Classes to add to the footer container.

params.name: attributes
params.description: HTML attributes (for example data attributes) to add to the footer container.
